title: Rooftop Solar Yield Model
description: A financial and performance model for rooftop PV installations, forecasting yield, payback period, and ROI across different panel configurations.

title: Smart Grid Load Balancer
description: An automation prototype that shifts flexible loads to periods of high renewable generation, reducing peak demand on the local grid.

title: Wind Farm Condition Monitoring
description: A sensor-driven monitoring dashboard for turbine health, flagging maintenance needs before failures affect output.
